size_estimate.description: Employee count or range, e.g., '~280 employees'

funding_stage.description: Most recent funding stage, e.g., 'Series B', 'Bootstrapped', 'Public'

total_funding.description: Total funding raised to date if known, e.g., '$62M'

description.description: One-sentence description of what the company does

triggers.description: Ranked list of recent events with sales relevance, sorted by recency descending

event.description: Specific description of the event, including names and amounts where applicable

date.description: Date or approximate date of the event, e.g., '2025-03-14' or 'early March 2025'

sales_relevance.description: Why this event matters for a sales conversation and what pain or need it implies

source_url.description: Source URL for this trigger if available

tech_stack.description: Specific tool names identified in the company's tech stack

headcount_growth_yoy.description: YoY headcount change, e.g., '+34% YoY' or 'declined ~12%'

notable_hiring_areas.description: Functional areas with significant open roles

geographic_expansion.description: New markets or offices opened if found

recommended_angle.description: Specific, research-grounded outreach angle for the first email or call. Must reference at least one specific finding.

low_signal_flag.description: Set to true if no meaningful triggers were found and the company appears dormant or has very limited public presence

raw_research_notes.description: Freeform notes capturing additional findings, interesting details, or caveats that did not fit the structured fields
